findings.summary: The retry loop in HttpSupportResistanceSource.collect immediately throws on timeouts (AbortError) and generic network errors instead of allowing the loop to retry, bypassing the maxAttempts logic.
findings.suggested_fix: Modify the catch block to only throw AbortError and generic network errors if attempt >= this.maxAttempts - 1. If attempt is less than maxAttempts - 1, wrap the error or simply allow the loop to continue to the next attempt.

findings.summary: Missing test coverage for the retry loop logic in HttpSupportResistanceSource.collect.
findings.suggested_fix: Add test cases that verify HttpSupportResistanceSource actually retries up to maxAttempts on transient failures like timeouts, network errors, and 5xx statuses before eventually returning a result or throwing.
